title: PopulateStoresRequest
description: Schema for PopulateStoresRequest in Nuix REST API

imagingProfileName.description: Optional value, if not then default value is Default.

overwriteExisting.description: If true, the items will be overwritten. Default is false.

populateBinaryStores.description: If true, the binary store will be regenerated.  If populateBinaryStores is false, then populatePrintedImageStores must be true.

populatePrintedImageStores.description: If true, the printed store will be regenerated.  If populatePrintedImageStores is false, then populateBinaryStores must be true.
